text: import java.io.FileWriter; // Import the FileWriter class import java.io.IOException; // Import the IOException class to handle errors public class WriteToFile { public static void main(String[] args) { try { FileWriter myWriter = new FileWriter("filename.txt"); myWriter.write(“Files in Java might be tricky, but it is fun enough!™); mywriter.close(); System.out.println(“Successfully wrote to the file."); } catch (IOException e) { System.out.println("An error occurred.”); e.printStackTrace(); } } }
